task: Amazon Gaming Laptop Search Portal Analysis

portal_mappings.name: Results Grid Container
portal_mappings.description: Main results container (48 items per page)

portal_mappings.name: Product Detail Navigation
portal_mappings.description: Click product title to view detail page

portal_mappings.name: Brand Filter
portal_mappings.description: Multi-select brand filter (ASUS, MSI, HP, etc)

portal_mappings.name: Specification Filter
portal_mappings.description: Filter by GPU, RAM, CPU specifications

edge_cases: Sponsored results mixed with organic (differentiate via aria-label)
Out of stock products show 'Add to Wishlist' instead of 'Add to Cart'
Some products require size/configuration selection (two-step add-to-cart)

2_prime_wiki_node.title: PrimeWiki Node: Amazon Gaming Laptop Search

key_sections.claim_graph: Mermaid flowchart with claims, evidence, synthesis, proof layers
key_sections.user_flow_architecture: Visual flowchart of search entry → filters → results → detail → cart
key_sections.portal_mappings: Detailed selector mappings for 10 major portals
canon_claims: Grid layout uses CSS semantic classes with data-* attributes
Seven primary filter channels (price, brand, specs, rating, prime, availability, seller)
Product cards are clickable state machines with multiple action paths
Pagination uses offset-based pattern with max 10 visible pages
key_sections.metadata: YAML with scores, tags, validation, edge cases
key_sections.executable_code: Python class AmazonGamingLaptopPortal with methods for extraction, filtering, pagination

3_integration_code.title: Python Integration Code for Persistent Browser Server

methods.name: analyze_page_structure(page)
methods.returns: Dict with page structure, products preview, filter options

methods.name: extract_portals(page)
methods.returns: Dict of portal definitions with status
methods.use: Verify all selectors on current page

endpoints.description: Analyze current page and return structure + portals
Get all portal definitions as JSON
Get Mermaid diagram code by type
endpoints.returns: Mermaid code ready for live editor

endpoints.description: Extract all product cards from current results
endpoints.returns: List of products with ASIN, title, price, rating, etc

4_integration_function.name: setup_amazon_portal_routes(app, browser_server)
4_integration_function.purpose: Register all routes with aiohttp application

integration_instructions.step_2: In persistent_browser_server.py, add import: from amazon_gaming_laptop_portal import setup_amazon_portal_routes
integration_instructions.step_3: In setup_routes() method, add: setup_amazon_portal_routes(self.app, self)

example_curl_commands.name: Navigate and analyze
example_curl_commands.command: curl -X POST http://localhost:9223/navigate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"url": "https://www.amazon.com/s?k=gaming+laptops"}' && sleep 2 && curl -X POST http://localhost:9223/analyze-amazon-page | jq

files.description: Complete knowledge node with diagrams, portals, claims, evidence
